full_text:
Li Jin (Shuyu)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Jin, styledShuyu, was born in Yingchuan. Urged his sons to support Cao Cao over close friend Zhang Miao and Yuan Shu, connected by family. Li Jin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Li Jin lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
